title: Fluid Type Scale
description: Create a complete fluid type scale using clamp() for all heading levels (h1-h6) and body text.
hint: Use clamp(minSize, preferredSize, maxSize) where preferred uses vw units.

title: Responsive Container System
description: Build a responsive container system using min() for max-width behavior without the max-width property.
hint: Use width: min(100% - 2rem, 1200px) for a padded responsive container.

title: Fluid Card Grid
description: Design a card grid where column count, card width, spacing, and typography all use clamp() for a fully fluid experience.
hint: Use clamp() for card min-width, gap, padding, and font sizes — all scaling with viewport.

title: clamp-based Component Library
description: Build a small component library where every sizing and spacing value uses clamp() for fluid responsiveness. Include buttons, cards, badges, and inputs.
hint: Define spacing and sizing scales using clamp() with CSS variables for consistency across components.
